allow: Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo config\(''mail.mailer''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.host''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.port''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.username''\);")

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo config\(''mail.default''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.mailers.smtp.host''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.mailers.smtp.port''\) . '' | '' . config\(''mail.mailers.smtp.username''\);")

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$dates = App\\Models\\ScheduleDate::where\(""schedule_id"", 12\)->get\(\); foreach\($dates as $d\) { echo ""ID: "" . $d->id . "" | Date: "" . $d->departure_date . "" | Seats: "" . $d->available_seats . "" | Status: "" . $d->status . ""\\n""; } if\($dates->isEmpty\(\)\) echo ""No dates for schedule 12\\n"";')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$bus = App\\Models\\Bus::where\(""registration_number"", ""NNA 0031""\)->first\(\); echo ""Bus ID: "" . $bus->id . "" | Total Seats: "" . $bus->total_seats . ""\\n""; $layout = json_decode\($bus->seat_layout, true\) ?? []; $available = collect\($layout\)->where\(""status"", ""available""\)->count\(\); echo ""Available seats from layout: "" . $available . ""\\n"";')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$sd = App\\Models\\ScheduleDate::create\([""schedule_id"" => 12, ""departure_date"" => ""2026-03-01"", ""available_seats"" => 30, ""status"" => ""scheduled""]\); echo ""Created ScheduleDate ID: "" . $sd->id . "" | Date: "" . $sd->departure_date . "" | Seats: "" . $sd->available_seats . "" | Status: "" . $sd->status . ""\\n"";')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$drivers = App\\Models\\Driver::with\(""user""\)->get\(\); foreach\($drivers as $d\) { echo ""Driver ID: "" . $d->id . "" | User: "" . $d->user->name . "" | Provider: "" . $d->provider_id . "" | Status: "" . $d->status . ""\\n""; } if\($drivers->isEmpty\(\)\) echo ""No drivers found\\n""; echo ""\\n""; $assignments = App\\Models\\DriverAssignment::where\(""schedule_date_id"", 87\)->get\(\); if\($assignments->isEmpty\(\)\) echo ""No driver assigned to schedule date 87\\n""; else foreach\($assignments as $a\) echo ""Assignment ID: "" . $a->id . "" | Driver: "" . $a->driver_id . "" | Status: "" . $a->status . ""\\n"";')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$schedule = App\\Models\\Schedule::with\(""bus""\)->find\(12\); echo ""Schedule 12 bus provider_id: "" . $schedule->bus->provider_id . ""\\n""; echo ""Driver 2 provider_id: 5\\n""; if\($schedule->bus->provider_id == 5\) echo ""Same provider - can assign!\\n""; else echo ""Different provider!\\n"";')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$assignment = App\\Models\\DriverAssignment::create\([""driver_id"" => 2, ""schedule_date_id"" => 87, ""status"" => ""assigned""]\); echo ""Assignment created! ID: "" . $assignment->id . "" | Driver: "" . $assignment->driver_id . "" | ScheduleDate: "" . $assignment->schedule_date_id . "" | Status: "" . $assignment->status . ""\\n"";')
